feature.name: Content type in Resource Timing
feature.creator: abin.paul1@gmail.com
feature.summary: Adds the contentType field to PerformanceResourceTiming to hold a string corresponding to the content type of the fetched resource as returned by the server.

intake.finding: ChromeStatus record (created 2022-08-21 by abin.paul1@gmail.com). Adds the contentType field to PerformanceResourceTiming to hold a string corresponding to the content type of the fetched resource as returned by the server.  Category: Performance. Blink component: Blink>PerformanceAPIs>ResourceTiming. Stars: 52.
intake.limitations: ChromeStatus record fields only; intent thread content not directly accessible.

incubation.finding: Feature targets web feature 'resource-timing'. This is an official WebDX feature. Problem definition depends on the spec/explainer which was not directly accessible.
incubation.limitations: No public explainer or incubation discussion accessible.

prototype.finding: No public evidence of prototype-stage friction logs, API ergonomics testing, or framework integration.

developerTrials.finding: No developer trial was conducted or required for this feature.

wideReview.finding: Feature maps to official WebDX feature 'resource-timing'. Cross-engine positions not verified in this report.

adoption.finding: The legacy HTML/JS counter 'ResourceTiming' (ChromeStatus timeline, bucket_id 3350) measured 43.5461% of measured Chrome HTTP/HTTPS page loads on 2026-07-20. Tracked since 2020-07-24 with 2157 data points. Mapping confidence: name-matched-family.
adoption.limitations: Counter measures the ResourceTiming family/property, not this specific feature. Does not isolate the Chrome 148 increment.

deprecation.finding: This is a capability addition or behavior change, not a deprecation.
